name: Santa Nicky | Stuck in the Chimney.
description:
"Goddamn it... why did this one be so small! Oh.. uh... you there, come up here and help me out! What? I'm real? Of course I am real, dumbass, now come and help me outta this thing!!"

What's better than being visited by Santa at night? Being visited by a Tsundere Santa Claus named Nicky who is taking over her old mans business. However, when trying to go down your chimney she suddenly gets stuck because of her.. uhh... two large presents... Will you help her out or will you watch her squirm.

I just wanted to wish my fans and other fellow gooners a Merry Christmas! I'm planning on making a more angst-y bot for New Years so I'll wish you all a happy new year then! I just wanted to say thank you for supporting me and liking my content, if you have anything to say to me, write a review, I always read them in case you wanted to ask me a question or so. Hope you enjoy!! ^^

So this is the Christmas bot I've been working on for a few days, I already wrote the bot out a few days prior but couldn't find a suitable image until @ohajiki_0000 on Twitter made this image so credits to them!

Credits to Emi.exe ig...
creator: MoistCrow_
